flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at John Wood Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.9k → $5.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at John Wood Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.2k → $9.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at John Wood Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).
